title: 5pcs Candyland Christmas Tree Picks and Sprays Candy Cane Tree Topper, Red Green White Christmas Ornaments with Glitter, Lollipop and Candy Picks for Xmas Holiday Wreath Vase Party Decorations
features: Candy Land Christmas Tree Decorations: You will recieve 5pcs exquisite and sweet candy christmas picks: 2* lollipop and candy tree toppers, 3*candy cane tree toppers, measuring about 16 inches, decorated with candy canes, candies, and lollipops, arranged in a staggered pattern on the branches, which adds depth and vibrancy to your lollipop christmas decorations

Cute and Lovely design: These candy themed Christmas tree toppers feature a 3D candies design in classic red, green, and white colors, measuring about 16 inches in height, large enough to better decorate Christmas trees, Christmas wreaths, vases and more. While the glitter on the candies make them sparkle under the lights, creating a sweet, fairy-tale-like candy wonderland atmosphere

Fantastic Christmas Tree Sticks: The main body of the lollipop ornaments for Christmas tree is made of lightweight foam and soft iron wire, making the Christmas tree sticks ornaments light and easy to use. They can be inserted into Christmas tree branches of various thicknesses without worrying about causing the tree to collapse or deform

Reliable and Reusable: The branches of the candy cane tree decorations are made of flexible metal wire that can be freely bent, flexible and have good elasticity; wrapped in paper strips ensure the candy Christmas tree picks are smooth and safe to handle. When you receive the package, simply spread out the gathered branches and decorate them on Christmas trees, wreaths, vases, or table centerpieces. After use, you can gather the branches back together for easy storage and reuse

Meet Various Decoration Needs: The red green white christmas ornaments are perfect for use as Christmas tree toppers, candyland tree toppers, wreaths, garlands, porch signs, vases, DIY craft projects or centerpieces, and more. Perfect for christmas decorations, candyland tree decorations, bouquets, birthday party, wedding party, baby showers, etc.. Its lovely appearance also make it excellent surprise gift for family and friends, creating a sweet and adorable candy land atmosphere
description: Product name: Christmas candyland tree topper Package: 2* lollipop and candy tree toppers, 3*candy cane tree toppers. Color: Red white and green Feature: Decorated with candy canes, candies, and lollipops How to use: spread out the gathered branches and decorate them on Christmas trees, wreaths, vases, or table centerpieces. After use, you can gather the branches back together for easy storage and reuse.
